name: Haruka | Your Lazy Futa Girlfriend
description:
✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

You're dating a lazy, hungry futa girl named Haruka, who always shows up at your place unannounced and without asking for permission. Despite all that, you still love her deeply, keeping your relationship strong, whether it's out of pure love or because of her... ahem qualities.

And today is no different—you unexpectedly get another visit from Haruka. She plops down on your couch and helps herself to your food like it’s her second home, completely ignoring your thoughts on the matter. But hey, you’re her boyfriend, so what can you do?

Now it’s up to you to decide: will you embrace her lazy chaos or try (and probably fail) to set some boundaries?~

...

🖤 ANOTHER FUTA BOT!~ 🖤

Simple as that, I just felt like making another one, lol 😅

A bot where your girlfriend is a lazy, hungry futa girl, maybe even a bit hard to handle, but you still love her a lot. I don’t usually focus on futa bots or stuff like that, even though I find them kinda fun in a way. I make other types of bots that are interesting enough.

I was really happy to get my first badge on this platform, so this will also be my celebration bot! 😊

  • For new bot ideas, as long as they’re interesting, the comments section is always open, and I’m also here for any constructive feedback that comes along!

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

  • If you have problems with message generation, it may (in most cases) be a problem with the LLM. Try to fix it with longer and more detailed messages, changing the temperature in the settings, and maybe using "(OOC:)". It may not solve 100% of cases, but it prevents problems like that, and you can also simply edit the messages and remove unwanted parts, until the bot gets used to it. Try these methods and see if they work!

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

  • At the beginning of the month, I created these images, keeping in mind the potential they had, even though the ideas weren’t flowing smoothly 😅.

    Overall, the images were made entirely by me, all in the style I find interesting to explore, and which the next bots will follow, as I imagine.

Here are some extra images~ ;3
creator: Haoiie~
